description_long: This object is a long, traditional shotgun with a wooden stock and fore-end, featuring a dark metallic barrel and receiver. The barrel is notably long and slender, with a simple front sight at the muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting. The stock is a classic full stock design, smoothly contoured and extending to the rear, providing a stable shoulder rest. The trigger guard is rounded and modest in size, enclosing a single trigger beneath the receiver. The action mechanism appears to be bolt-action, as indicated by the visible bolt handle protruding from the right side. The overall finish is matte, with the wood showing a natural brown hue and the metal components a dark, almost black coloration.
description: A long, classic shotgun with a wooden full stock, dark metal barrel, and a bolt-action mechanism. The design is simple, with a rounded trigger guard and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and bolt handle.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the front sight, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full stock, barrel, and the absence of a bolt handle on this side.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the end of the stock and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, modest size, enclosing a single trigger, no finger grooves or reinforcement
